programmes.show_description: Chillingham Castle. The team of paranormal experts investigates Chillingham Castle's bloody history, and a midnight séance gets out of hand, leaving the team shaken. S1, Ep1
The Leopard Inn. The team travel to Stoke-on-Trent to explore The Leopard Inn, a historic hotel with hidden secrets where numerous sightings of shadowy figures have been reported. S1, Ep2

In Gloucestershire, Drew uncovers a marble table lamp and a painting of a mackerel. Later, he's thrilled to look around a stately home in Bedfordshire. S15, Ep2
Drew and Tee are invited to a private motor museum in Denbighshire. This fascinating collection boasts a steel plate Castrol sign and a charming pedal car. S15, Ep3
A couple want to make a life for themselves in Dorset. They have a £625,000 budget to spend on a beautiful, modern property with an amazing sea view. S7, Ep19

Drew is in rural Somerset to rummage through a salvage yard. He tries to buy an industrial ceiling light, a marble column plinth and an antiques sign. S15, Ep6
At a railway museum in Somerset, Drew and Tee uncover two rare signs from the 1920s. Later, Drew finds shoe last made for music legend Paul McCartney. S15, Ep7

The Million Pound Painting? An old portrait painting could be worth a fortune. It's a race against time for Irita and her team to identify the famous artist before auction day. S1, Ep7/10

programmes.show_name: Long Lost Family: Born Without Trace
programmes.show_description: A man who became famous as 'The Ice Baby', after being found in a London phone box on the coldest night of the year, searches for answers. S4, Ep2

House On The Hill. The team head to an isolated farmhouse to help a couple who are being tormented by terrifying paranormal activity including being attacked in bed. S6, Ep4
De Grey St. The experts travel to a house in Hull after a petrified man believes troubled spirits and dark entities are at work in his home. S1, Ep3
The Queens Oak. The team travel to the Queens Oak pub in picturesque Finchampstead to help the new owners, who say that malevolent spirits are disrupting their business. S1, Ep4
The Bate Hall. The team of investigators travel to Macclesfield to explore a 15th century coaching inn that is supposedly haunted by a small boy and a mysterious grey lady. S1, Ep5
